content.speakerText: My dog is so happy—he even licked your face!
content.speakerTextCn: 我狗太开心了，都亲你脸了！

options.text: He's adorable—I’d do it again tomorrow!
I'll charge you next time for that!
Dogs shouldn't be allowed to lick people.
I'm sorry he made a mess.

content.explanation: 正确答案回应了宠物的可爱行为并表达了乐意再次照顾的态度，符合积极情感联结的语境。干扰项中，第二项暗示收费，与感恩语境冲突；第三项是负面评价，不合时宜；第四项过度道歉，忽略了对方的感激情绪。

content.speakerTextCn: 你是我见过最棒的宠物保姆！

options.text: Thanks! You're the best friend ever.
Of course, I get paid for this.
I wish I could do more.

content.explanation: 正确答案以谦逊且温暖的方式回应赞美，同时回赠赞美，符合英语社交礼仪。干扰项中，第二项强调报酬，破坏了友好氛围；第三项过于自我贬低，显得不自然；第四项虽谦虚但未回应对方的情感，略显冷淡。

content.speakerText: I really appreciate you taking care of my cat while I was away.
content.speakerTextCn: 我很感激你在我外出时照顾我的猫。

options.text: It was my pleasure—she’s such a sweetie!
I hope you didn't spend too much money.
Cats are hard to handle, you're lucky I did it.
Next time, I'll need a bonus.

content.explanation: 正确答案表达了乐意帮忙并赞美宠物，强化了情感联结。干扰项中，第二项关注花费，偏离情感主题；第三项带有优越感，不礼貌；第四项索要报酬，完全违背感恩语境。

content.hint: 表达愿意再次帮忙的常用时间表达
content.knowledgePoint: would like to do（表达意愿的核心句型）

content.template: It was ___ least I could do!
content.hint: 固定搭配，表示‘这是我该做的’
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达 the least I could do

content.hint: 用宠物的爱作为回报的幽默表达
content.knowledgePoint: 场景核心隐喻表达（payment 用于非金钱回报）

content.speakerText: My dog is so happy—he even licked your face!
content.speakerTextCn: 我狗太开心了，都亲你脸了！
expectedAnswers: He's adorable—I’d do it again tomorrow!
Puppy love is the best payment!
I love when pets show affection like that—I truly enjoyed it!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否正面回应了宠物的情感互动
语言准确性：语法和词汇使用是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合英语口语习惯，语气真诚
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'adorable', 'puppy love', 'enjoyed' 等场景关键词

content.speakerTextCn: 你是我见过最棒的宠物保姆！
expectedAnswers: Thanks! You're the best friend ever.
I'm flattered—I really care about your pet!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否谦逊得体地回应了极高赞美
语言准确性：是否使用了正确的回应句型
表达自然度：语气是否真诚自然，不夸张也不冷漠
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'flattered', 'just doing my part', 'best friend' 等核心表达

content.speakerText: Thank you so much for watching my rabbit. I was so worried!
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢你照看我的兔子，我真的很担心！
expectedAnswers: Don't worry—I made sure she had fresh veggies and a cozy spot!
It was no trouble at all! She's so cute and calm.
I'm glad I could help—your rabbit is such a sweetheart!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否缓解了对方的担忧并传递安心感
语言准确性：是否使用了恰当的动词搭配如 'made sure', 'had fresh veggies'
表达自然度：是否体现关心和温暖的语气
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'no trouble', 'sweetheart', 'glad I could help' 等场景高频表达
